Linen cloth

Linen cloth
Type: Material
Value: 1
Fine Value: 11
Keywords: Fabric
Processed
Properties:
Bankable:     Droppable:
Sellable:     Tradable:

A basic piece of fabric, usually used by novice tailors to make clothing.

The Linen cloth item is a material.

Attributes (Input)

Quality Attributes

+15 Bonus experience While doing Tailoring.
+20% Bonus experience While doing Tailoring.

Uses

Recipe Ingredient

Linen cloth is an ingredient in the following recipes:

Item Name Service
Requirement 		Skills Materials
Used 		Recipe
Outputs
Make tatty handwraps Needs Basic Loom service or better. Tailoring lvl. 6 2x Linen cloth 1x Tatty handwraps
Make tatty skirt Needs Basic Loom service or better. Tailoring lvl. 8 2x Linen cloth 1x Tatty skirt
Make a tatty garb Needs Basic Loom service or better. Tailoring lvl. 10 2x Linen cloth 1x Tatty garb
Make grassknot mitts Needs Basic Loom service or better. Tailoring lvl. 13 1x Linen cloth
1x Grass		 1x Grassknot mitts
Make grassknot chaps Needs Basic Loom service or better. Tailoring lvl. 15 2x Linen cloth
1x Grass		 1x Grassknot chaps
Make a grassknot tunic Needs Basic Loom service or better. Tailoring lvl. 17 2x Linen cloth
1x Grass		 1x Grassknot tunic
Make apprentice handwear Needs Basic Loom service or better. Tailoring lvl. 18 1x Linen cloth
1x Basic leather		 1x Apprentice handwear
Make apprentice breeches Needs Basic Loom service or better. Tailoring lvl. 20 2x Linen cloth
1x Basic leather		 1x Apprentice breeches
Make an apprentice vest Needs Basic Loom service or better. Tailoring lvl. 22 2x Linen cloth
1x Basic leather		 1x Apprentice vest

1x Basic leather

1x Basic leather

Make an elderhide tunic Needs Advanced Loom service or better. Tailoring lvl. 54 3x Linen cloth
1x Elderhide leather		 1x Elderhide tunic

Activity Input

Linen cloth can be used as an input for the following activities:

Activity Name Locations Requirements Note
Large sail repair Blackspell Port in GDTE Needs 1x Fabric This activity gains no extra benefit from using fine material inputs.
Small sail repair Port Skildar in Jarvonia Needs 1x Fabric This activity gains no extra benefit from using fine material inputs.

Sources

Primary Recipe Output

Make linen cloth

Spin fibers into fine threads, then carefully weave them into a soft and durable linen cloth. Each step requires patience and precision, as you transform raw materials into a versatile textile.

Weave fine threads into a soft and durable cloth.

Recipe Outputs
Recipe Name Level Service
Requirement 		Materials
Used 		Recipe
Outputs
Make linen cloth Tailoring lvl. 1 Needs Basic Loom service or better. 2x Hemp or 2x Flax or 1x Bamboo logs 1x Linen cloth
